name: morphology-explorer
description: Local morphology explorer for Arabic and Japanese

scripts.build:deps: npm run build -w @morphology-explorer/core && npm run build -w @morphology-explorer/data && npm run build -w @morphology-explorer/analyzer
scripts.dev: npm run build:deps && npm run dev -w app
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:deps && concurrently -k "npm run dev -w app" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run start -w @morphology-explorer/electron -- --dev"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build:deps && npm run build -w app && npm run build -w @morphology-explorer/electron
scripts.mobile: npm run build:deps && npm run start -w @morphology-explorer/mobile
scripts.mobile:android: npm run build:deps && npm run android -w @morphology-explorer/mobile
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run build:deps && npm run ios -w @morphology-explorer/mobile
